description: Frozen ground-truth manifest for collision-cause attribution validation (issue #5443). Each entry pins the injected cause class, activation window, allowed intervention, ambiguity status, and avoidability before analysis. Covers the predeclared validation matrix: one activation per single cause, at least one interacting/ambiguous fixture, and negative controls. This is a validation contract, not benchmark evidence; it stores no raw traces or videos.

fixtures.notes: A pedestrian detection is dropped from the observation for one step; restoring it at step 12 avoids contact.
Observation stream is delayed by three steps across the window; removing the lag lets the planner brake in time.
Pedestrian forecast omits a turn; correcting the predicted track at step 15 restores clearance.
The evasive candidate action is pruned from the candidate set; reinstating it avoids contact.
A safe candidate is present but the selector picks a colliding one; forcing the safe pick avoids contact.
The safety guard that would veto the unsafe command is disabled across the window; enabling it avoids contact.
The commanded deceleration exceeds actuation limits and saturates; the feasible command still avoids contact.
The assigned route commits early to a corridor with no evasive room; rerouting before step 3 avoids the trap.
By step 18 the pedestrian has entered the braking distance with no feasible evasion; contact is unavoidable.
A footprint-inflation quirk flags a collision at the reporting step though no physical contact occurs; the cause is a metric artifact, not a planner fault.
A prediction miss and a guard omission overlap; either single intervention alone leaves contact, so no single cause is decisive.
An early route commitment and a late bad selection jointly cause contact; neither counterfactual alone resolves it.
A suspicious observation-jitter signal is present but does not change the counterfactual outcome; it must not be promoted to a cause.
A guard toggles briefly but its state never gates the applied command on this trace; correlation without causal effect.
